purpose: Trigger evaluation for the advise router. Should fire on general questions and route to specialized skills when intent is clear.

prompts.input: Should we add llms.txt to our marketing site?
prompts.rationale: Decision question — primary use case for advise

prompts.input: Is llms.txt actually worth it for us?
What does llms.txt do? Explain it to me
What's the SOTA on llms.txt in 2026?
Generate a new llms.txt for our docs site
prompts.rationale: Generation request — should route to generate, not stay in advise

prompts.input: Help me set up the plugin for the first time
prompts.rationale: Setup request — should route to cold-start

prompts.input: I'm not sure if we even need this — talk me through it
prompts.rationale: Uncertain user wants discussion — advise handles this with potential SKIP recommendation
